productDisplayName: Gini and Jony Girl's Valencia Green Blue Infant Kidswear
description: Compositiontop: Aqua green round neck top made of 100% cotton, with triple layer flared cap sleeves, heat transferred lettering on the front with subliminal print on the front hemline and eyelet closure on the back shorts: Blue shorts made of stretchable cotton fabric, with elasticated waist, two insert pockets on the front and two patch pockets on the back with embroideryFittingTop: RegularShorts: Regular Wash careMachine wash separately in cold waterUse mild detergentDo not bleachAvoid soakingRemove promptlyLine dry inside out in shadeWarm iron onlyDo not iron directly on print/embroideryIndulge the urban spirit of your little girl in this green city girl tee and denim shorts combo from gini and jony. The bold "City Girl" lettering in silver on the chest and the sublime doodle graphics on the hemline, all add to the carefree spirit of this tee. Team this with the super comfy denim shorts and crocs footwear for happy, casual outings with your little one, while the pure cotton fabric stays soft on his skin and keeps her fresh and comfortable all day.
